panels.description: Warning-level alerts for the selected metric, borough and zone type over the dashboard time range.

targets.query:
import "array"

warnings =
    from(bucket: "urban_alerts")
        |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
        |> filter(fn: (r) =>
            r._measurement == "urban_alerts" and
            r._field == "severity_level" and
            r._value == 1 and
            r.metric == "${metric}" and
            r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
            r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
        )
        |> group(columns: [])
        |> count(column: "_value")
        |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

fallback = array.from(rows: [{_value: 0}])

union(tables: [warnings, fallback])
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> sum(column: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _value: int(v: r._value)}))
    |> yield(name: "metric_warnings")

panels.title: ${metric} Warnings

panels.description: Critical-level alerts for the selected metric, borough and zone type over the dashboard time range.

            r._value == 2 and
            r.metric == "${metric}" and
            r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
            r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
        )
        |> group(columns: [])
        |> count(column: "_value")
        |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

fallback = array.from(rows: [{_value: 0}])

union(tables: [criticities, fallback])
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> sum(column: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _value: int(v: r._value)}))
    |> yield(name: "metric_criticities")

panels.title: ${metric} Criticities

panels.description: Distinct grid zones with at least one critical alert for the selected metric over the dashboard time range.

targets.query:
import "array"

critical_zones =
    from(bucket: "urban_alerts")
        |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
        |> filter(fn: (r) =>
            r._measurement == "urban_alerts" and
            r._field == "severity_level" and
            r._value == 2 and
            r.metric == "${metric}" and
            r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
            r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
        )
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])
        |> count(column: "_value")
        |> group(columns: [])
        |> count(column: "_value")
        |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

fallback = array.from(rows: [{_value: 0}])

union(tables: [critical_zones, fallback])
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> sum(column: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _value: int(v: r._value)}))
    |> yield(name: "metric_critical_zones")

panels.title: ${metric} Critical Zones

panels.description: Age in seconds of the most recent raw telemetry point for the selected metric. This is a data freshness indicator.
panels.title: ${metric} Raw Data Age

panels.description: Spatial distribution of warning and critical alerts for the selected metric, borough and zone type over the dashboard time range. Marker size is alert count; marker color is maximum severity.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    grid_id,
    display_name,
    borough,
    zone_type,
    center_lat AS latitude,
    center_lon AS longitude
FROM grid_context
WHERE borough ~ '^(${borough:regex})$'
  AND zone_type ~ '^(${zone_type:regex})$'
ORDER BY grid_id;

panels.title: ${metric} Risk Geomap

panels.description: Top zones by number of critical alerts for the selected metric over the dashboard time range.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "urban_alerts")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
        r._measurement == "urban_alerts" and
        r._field == "severity_level" and
        r._value == 2 and
        r.metric == "${metric}" and
        r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
        r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
    )
    |> group(columns: ["grid_id", "borough", "zone_type"])
    |> count(column: "_value")
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
    |> limit(n: 10)
    |> keep(columns: ["grid_id", "borough", "zone_type", "_value"])
    |> rename(columns: {grid_id: "Zone", borough: "Borough", zone_type: "Zone type", _value: "Critical alerts"})
    |> yield(name: "top_metric_critical_zones")

panels.title: Top Warning Zones — ${metric}

panels.description: Warning and critical alert counts for the selected metric by borough over the dashboard time range.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "urban_alerts")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
        r._measurement == "urban_alerts" and
        r._field == "severity_level" and
        r.metric == "${metric}" and
        r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
        r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
    )
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        Severity: if int(v: r._value) == 2 then "Critical" else "Warning"
    }))
    |> group(columns: ["borough", "Severity"])
    |> count(column: "_value")
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["borough"], columnKey: ["Severity"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> rename(columns: {borough: "Borough"})
    |> yield(name: "metric_alerts_by_borough_severity")

panels.title: ${metric} Alerts by Borough and Severity

panels.description: Latest alerts for the selected metric, borough and zone type over the dashboard time range.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "urban_alerts")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
        r._measurement == "urban_alerts" and
        r.metric == "${metric}" and
        r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
        r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/ and
        (
            r._field == "observed_value" or
            r._field == "threshold_value" or
            r._field == "severity_level"
        )
    )
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _value: float(v: r._value)
    }))
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> pivot(
        rowKey: ["_time", "grid_id", "metric", "borough", "zone_type"],
        columnKey: ["_field"],
        valueColumn: "_value"
    )
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        Severity: if int(v: r.severity_level) == 2 then "Critical" else "Warning",
        exceedance_pct: ((r.observed_value - r.threshold_value) / r.threshold_value) * 100.0
    }))
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
    |> limit(n: 50)
    |> keep(columns: [
        "_time",
        "Severity",
        "observed_value",
        "threshold_value",
        "exceedance_pct",
        "grid_id",
        "borough",
        "zone_type"
    ])
    |> rename(columns: {
        _time: "Time",
        observed_value: "Observed",
        threshold_value: "Threshold",
        exceedance_pct: "Exceedance %",
        grid_id: "Zone",
        borough: "Borough",
        zone_type: "Zone type"
    })
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> yield(name: "latest_metric_alerts")

panels.title: Latest ${metric} Alerts

panels.description: Hourly trend of the selected metric by borough over the dashboard time range.

targets.query:
import "date"

rangeNs = uint(v: v.timeRangeStop) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)
minRangeNs = uint(v: 172800000000000)   // 2 days
maxRangeNs = uint(v: 604800000000000)   // 7 days

trendStart =
    if rangeNs < minRangeNs then date.sub(d: 2d, from: v.timeRangeStop)
    else if rangeNs > maxRangeNs then date.sub(d: 7d, from: v.timeRangeStop)
    else v.timeRangeStart

from(bucket: "urban_hourly")
    |> range(start: trendStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
        r._measurement == "urban_telemetry" and
        r._field == "${metric}" and
        r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
        r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
    )
    |> group(columns: ["borough"])
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "borough"])
    |> yield(name: "metric_trend_by_borough")

panels.title: ${metric} Trend by Borough

panels.description: Daily long-term trend of the selected metric over a fixed 180-day window. This panel intentionally ignores the dashboard time range.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "urban_daily")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
        r._measurement == "urban_telemetry" and
        r._field == "${metric}" and
        r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
        r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
    )
    |> group(columns: ["_field"])
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
    |> yield(name: "metric_long_term_daily_trend")

panels.title: ${metric} Long-term Daily Trend

panels.description: Average value of the selected metric by zone type over the dashboard time range.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "urban_hourly")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
        r._measurement == "urban_telemetry" and
        r._field == "${metric}" and
        r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
        r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
    )
    |> group(columns: ["zone_type"])
    |> mean(column: "_value")
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
    |> keep(columns: ["zone_type", "_value"])
    |> rename(columns: {zone_type: "Zone type", _value: "Average value"})
    |> yield(name: "metric_by_zone_type")

panels.title: Average ${metric} by Zone Type

panels.description: Distribution of selected metric values over time across all matching zones in the dashboard time range.

targets.query:
import "date"

rangeNs = uint(v: v.timeRangeStop) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)
minRangeNs = uint(v: 172800000000000)   // 2 days
maxRangeNs = uint(v: 604800000000000)   // 7 days

heatmapStart =
    if rangeNs < minRangeNs then date.sub(d: 2d, from: v.timeRangeStop)
    else if rangeNs > maxRangeNs then date.sub(d: 7d, from: v.timeRangeStop)
    else v.timeRangeStart

from(bucket: "urban_hourly")
    |> range(start: heatmapStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
        r._measurement == "urban_telemetry" and
        r._field == "${metric}" and
        r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
        r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
    )
    |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 6h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
    |> yield(name: "metric_distribution_heatmap")

panels.title: ${metric} Distribution over Time

panels.description: Integrated spatial view of green infrastructure and selected metric pressure over the dashboard time range. The soft green layer represents green-space concentration; overlaid markers represent average selected-metric pressure against the warning threshold.

targets.query:
import "sql"
import "influxdata/influxdb/secrets"

postgresDSN = secrets.get(key: "POSTGRES_DSN")

sql.from(
    driverName: "postgres",
    dataSourceName: postgresDSN,
    query: "SELECT grid_id, display_name, borough, zone_type, green_space_pct::double precision AS green_space_pct, center_lat::double precision AS latitude, center_lon::double precision AS longitude FROM grid_context WHERE borough ~ '^(${borough:regex})$' AND zone_type ~ '^(${zone_type:regex})$'"
)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: now(),
        grid_id: r.grid_id,
        display_name: r.display_name,
        borough: r.borough,
        zone_type: r.zone_type,
        latitude: r.latitude,
        longitude: r.longitude,
        green_space_pct: r.green_space_pct,
        green_intensity: r.green_space_pct,
        _value: r.green_space_pct
    }))
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> yield(name: "green_infrastructure_heatmap")

import "sql"
import "influxdata/influxdb/secrets"

postgresDSN = secrets.get(key: "POSTGRES_DSN")

zones =
    sql.from(
        driverName: "postgres",
        dataSourceName: postgresDSN,
        query: "SELECT grid_id, display_name, borough, zone_type, green_space_pct::double precision AS green_space_pct, estimated_population::double precision AS estimated_population, center_lat::double precision AS latitude, center_lon::double precision AS longitude FROM grid_context WHERE borough ~ '^(${borough:regex})$' AND zone_type ~ '^(${zone_type:regex})$'"
    )
    |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])

thresholds =
    sql.from(
        driverName: "postgres",
        dataSourceName: postgresDSN,
        query: "SELECT metric, warning_threshold::double precision AS warning_threshold, critical_threshold::double precision AS critical_threshold FROM threshold_profile WHERE metric = '${metric}'"
    )
    |> group(columns: ["metric"])

values =
    from(bucket: "urban_hourly")
        |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
        |> filter(fn: (r) =>
            r._measurement == "urban_telemetry" and
            r._field == "${metric}" and
            r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
            r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
        )
        |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with metric: r._field }))
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id", "metric"])
        |> max(column: "_value")
        |> rename(columns: {_value: "max_value"})
        |> keep(columns: ["grid_id", "metric", "max_value"])
        |> group(columns: ["metric"])

values_with_threshold =
    join(tables: {v: values, t: thresholds}, on: ["metric"])
        |> map(fn: (r) => ({
            grid_id: r.grid_id,
            metric: r.metric,
            max_value: float(v: r.max_value),
            warning_threshold: r.warning_threshold,
            critical_threshold: r.critical_threshold,
            threshold_utilization_pct: (float(v: r.max_value) / r.warning_threshold) * 100.0
        }))
        |> filter(fn: (r) =>
            r.max_value >= r.warning_threshold and
            r.max_value < r.critical_threshold
        )
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])

join(tables: {z: zones, v: values_with_threshold}, on: ["grid_id"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: now(),
        grid_id: r.grid_id,
        display_name: r.display_name,
        borough: r.borough,
        zone_type: r.zone_type,
        latitude: r.latitude,
        longitude: r.longitude,
        green_space_pct: r.green_space_pct,
        estimated_population: r.estimated_population,
        max_value: r.max_value,
        warning_threshold: r.warning_threshold,
        critical_threshold: r.critical_threshold,
        threshold_utilization_pct: r.threshold_utilization_pct,
        marker_size: r.threshold_utilization_pct,
        severity_label: "Warning"
    }))
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> sort(columns: ["threshold_utilization_pct"], desc: true)
    |> limit(n: 25)
    |> yield(name: "warning_pressure_markers")

import "sql"
import "influxdata/influxdb/secrets"

postgresDSN = secrets.get(key: "POSTGRES_DSN")

zones =
    sql.from(
        driverName: "postgres",
        dataSourceName: postgresDSN,
        query: "SELECT grid_id, display_name, borough, zone_type, green_space_pct::double precision AS green_space_pct, estimated_population::double precision AS estimated_population, center_lat::double precision AS latitude, center_lon::double precision AS longitude FROM grid_context WHERE borough ~ '^(${borough:regex})$' AND zone_type ~ '^(${zone_type:regex})$'"
    )
    |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])

thresholds =
    sql.from(
        driverName: "postgres",
        dataSourceName: postgresDSN,
        query: "SELECT metric, warning_threshold::double precision AS warning_threshold, critical_threshold::double precision AS critical_threshold FROM threshold_profile WHERE metric = '${metric}'"
    )
    |> group(columns: ["metric"])

values =
    from(bucket: "urban_hourly")
        |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
        |> filter(fn: (r) =>
            r._measurement == "urban_telemetry" and
            r._field == "${metric}" and
            r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
            r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
        )
        |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with metric: r._field }))
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id", "metric"])
        |> max(column: "_value")
        |> rename(columns: {_value: "max_value"})
        |> keep(columns: ["grid_id", "metric", "max_value"])
        |> group(columns: ["metric"])

values_with_threshold =
    join(tables: {v: values, t: thresholds}, on: ["metric"])
        |> map(fn: (r) => ({
            grid_id: r.grid_id,
            metric: r.metric,
            max_value: float(v: r.max_value),
            warning_threshold: r.warning_threshold,
            critical_threshold: r.critical_threshold,
            threshold_utilization_pct: (float(v: r.max_value) / r.warning_threshold) * 100.0
        }))
        |> filter(fn: (r) =>
            r.max_value >= r.critical_threshold
        )
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])

join(tables: {z: zones, v: values_with_threshold}, on: ["grid_id"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: now(),
        grid_id: r.grid_id,
        display_name: r.display_name,
        borough: r.borough,
        zone_type: r.zone_type,
        latitude: r.latitude,
        longitude: r.longitude,
        green_space_pct: r.green_space_pct,
        estimated_population: r.estimated_population,
        max_value: r.max_value,
        warning_threshold: r.warning_threshold,
        critical_threshold: r.critical_threshold,
        threshold_utilization_pct: r.threshold_utilization_pct,
        marker_size: r.threshold_utilization_pct,
        severity_label: "Critical"
    }))
    |> group(columns: [])
    |> sort(columns: ["threshold_utilization_pct"], desc: true)
    |> limit(n: 15)
    |> yield(name: "critical_pressure_markers")

panels.title: Green Infrastructure vs ${metric} Map

panels.description: Scatter plot showing the relationship between green-space percentage and average selected metric value. The linear trend is descriptive and does not imply causality.

targets.query:
import "sql"
import "influxdata/influxdb/secrets"

postgresDSN = secrets.get(key: "POSTGRES_DSN")

zones =
    sql.from(
        driverName: "postgres",
        dataSourceName: postgresDSN,
        query: "SELECT grid_id, display_name, borough, zone_type, green_space_pct::double precision AS green_space_pct, estimated_population::double precision AS estimated_population FROM grid_context WHERE borough ~ '^(${borough:regex})$' AND zone_type ~ '^(${zone_type:regex})$'"
    )
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])

values =
    from(bucket: "urban_hourly")
        |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
        |> filter(fn: (r) =>
            r._measurement == "urban_telemetry" and
            r._field == "${metric}" and
            r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
            r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
        )
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])
        |> mean(column: "_value")
        |> rename(columns: {_value: "avg_value"})
        |> keep(columns: ["grid_id", "avg_value"])
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])

points =
    join(tables: {z: zones, v: values}, on: ["grid_id"])
        |> map(fn: (r) => ({
            grid_id: r.grid_id,
            display_name: r.display_name,
            borough: r.borough,
            zone_type: r.zone_type,
            green_space_pct: float(v: r.green_space_pct),
            avg_value: float(v: r.avg_value),
            estimated_population: float(v: r.estimated_population),
            join_key: "all"
        }))
        |> group(columns: [])

stats =
    points
        |> reduce(
            identity: {
                n: 0.0,
                sum_x: 0.0,
                sum_y: 0.0,
                sum_xy: 0.0,
                sum_x2: 0.0
            },
            fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
                n: accumulator.n + 1.0,
                sum_x: accumulator.sum_x + r.green_space_pct,
                sum_y: accumulator.sum_y + r.avg_value,
                sum_xy: accumulator.sum_xy + r.green_space_pct * r.avg_value,
                sum_x2: accumulator.sum_x2 + r.green_space_pct * r.green_space_pct
            })
        )
        |> map(fn: (r) => ({
            join_key: "all",
            denominator: r.n * r.sum_x2 - r.sum_x * r.sum_x,
            slope:
                if (r.n * r.sum_x2 - r.sum_x * r.sum_x) == 0.0
                then 0.0
                else (r.n * r.sum_xy - r.sum_x * r.sum_y) / (r.n * r.sum_x2 - r.sum_x * r.sum_x),
            intercept:
                if (r.n * r.sum_x2 - r.sum_x * r.sum_x) == 0.0
                then r.sum_y / r.n
                else (r.sum_y - ((r.n * r.sum_xy - r.sum_x * r.sum_y) / (r.n * r.sum_x2 - r.sum_x * r.sum_x)) * r.sum_x) / r.n
        }))
        |> group(columns: ["join_key"])

join(tables: {p: points, s: stats}, on: ["join_key"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        "Green space %": r.green_space_pct,
        "Average value": r.avg_value,
        "Linear trend": r.intercept + r.slope * r.green_space_pct,
        Zone: r.grid_id,
        "Display name": r.display_name,
        Borough: r.borough,
        "Zone type": r.zone_type,
        "Estimated population": r.estimated_population
    }))
    |> sort(columns: ["Green space %"])
    |> yield(name: "green_space_scatter")

panels.title: Green Space vs ${metric}

panels.description: Environmental performance grouped by green infrastructure bands. Delta is computed against the average value of the selected metric over the filtered area and dashboard time range.

targets.query:
import "sql"
import "influxdata/influxdb/secrets"

postgresDSN = secrets.get(key: "POSTGRES_DSN")

zones =
    sql.from(
        driverName: "postgres",
        dataSourceName: postgresDSN,
        query: "SELECT grid_id, green_space_pct::double precision AS green_space_pct, estimated_population::double precision AS estimated_population, CASE WHEN green_space_pct < 20 THEN 'Low green (0-20%)' WHEN green_space_pct < 50 THEN 'Medium green (20-50%)' ELSE 'High green (>50%)' END AS green_band, CASE WHEN green_space_pct < 20 THEN 1 WHEN green_space_pct < 50 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END AS band_order FROM grid_context WHERE borough ~ '^(${borough:regex})$' AND zone_type ~ '^(${zone_type:regex})$'"
    )
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])

values =
    from(bucket: "urban_hourly")
        |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
        |> filter(fn: (r) =>
            r._measurement == "urban_telemetry" and
            r._field == "${metric}" and
            r.borough =~ /^(${borough:regex})$/ and
            r.zone_type =~ /^(${zone_type:regex})$/
        )
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])
        |> mean(column: "_value")
        |> rename(columns: {_value: "avg_value"})
        |> keep(columns: ["grid_id", "avg_value"])
        |> group(columns: ["grid_id"])

joined =
    join(tables: {z: zones, v: values}, on: ["grid_id"])
        |> map(fn: (r) => ({
            grid_id: r.grid_id,
            green_band: r.green_band,
            band_order: int(v: r.band_order),
            green_space_pct: float(v: r.green_space_pct),
            estimated_population: float(v: r.estimated_population),
            avg_value: float(v: r.avg_value)
        }))

area_average =
    joined
        |> group(columns: [])
        |> mean(column: "avg_value")
        |> map(fn: (r) => ({
            join_key: "all",
            area_average: r.avg_value
        }))
        |> group(columns: ["join_key"])

band_performance =
    joined
        |> group(columns: ["green_band", "band_order"])
        |> reduce(
            identity: {
                zones: 0,
                metric_sum: 0.0,
                green_sum: 0.0,
                population_sum: 0.0
            },
            fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
                zones: accumulator.zones + 1,
                metric_sum: accumulator.metric_sum + r.avg_value,
                green_sum: accumulator.green_sum + r.green_space_pct,
                population_sum: accumulator.population_sum + r.estimated_population
            })
        )
        |> map(fn: (r) => ({
            join_key: "all",
            green_band: r.green_band,
            band_order: r.band_order,
            zones: r.zones,
            avg_green_pct: r.green_sum / float(v: r.zones),
            avg_metric: r.metric_sum / float(v: r.zones),
            estimated_population: r.population_sum
        }))
        |> group(columns: ["join_key"])

join(tables: {b: band_performance, a: area_average}, on: ["join_key"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        "Green band": r.green_band,
        "Band order": r.band_order,
        "Zones": r.zones,
        "Avg green %": r.avg_green_pct,
        "Avg value": r.avg_metric,
        "Area avg value": r.area_average,
        "Delta vs area avg %": ((r.avg_metric - r.area_average) / r.area_average) * 100.0,
        "Estimated population": r.estimated_population
    }))
    |> sort(columns: ["Band order"])
    |> keep(columns: [
        "Green band",
        "Zones",
        "Avg green %",
        "Avg value",
        "Area avg value",
        "Delta vs area avg %",
        "Estimated population"
    ])
    |> yield(name: "green_band_performance")

panels.title: Green Band Performance — ${metric}

list.definition:
SELECT
    metric AS __text,
    metric AS __value
FROM threshold_profile
ORDER BY
    CASE metric
        WHEN 'pm25' THEN 1
        WHEN 'pm10' THEN 2
        WHEN 'no2' THEN 3
        WHEN 'o3' THEN 4
        WHEN 'noise_db' THEN 5
        ELSE 99
    END;
list.label: Metric
list.name: metric
list.query:
SELECT
    metric AS __text,
    metric AS __value
FROM threshold_profile
ORDER BY
    CASE metric
        WHEN 'pm25' THEN 1
        WHEN 'pm10' THEN 2
        WHEN 'no2' THEN 3
        WHEN 'o3' THEN 4
        WHEN 'noise_db' THEN 5
        ELSE 99
    END;

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    borough AS __text,
    borough AS __value
FROM grid_context
ORDER BY borough;
list.label: Borough
list.name: borough
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    borough AS __text,
    borough AS __value
FROM grid_context
ORDER BY borough;

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    zone_type AS __text,
    zone_type AS __value
FROM grid_context
WHERE borough ~ '^(${borough:regex})$'
ORDER BY zone_type;
list.label: Zone type
list.name: zone_type
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    zone_type AS __text,
    zone_type AS __value
FROM grid_context
WHERE borough ~ '^(${borough:regex})$'
ORDER BY zone_type;
